item.title: ClawWall coverage parity — audit sanitizer against Clawdius production firewall
item.intent: ClawHQ sanitizer must match or exceed battle-tested production firewall. Gaps mean real injection vectors.
item.description: Clawdius recon (2026-03-29): sanitize.py 1,329 lines, OWASP LLM01 Tier 1+2. ClawHQ has src/secure/sanitizer/ — audit delta.
